title: Cabinet papers – Confirmation of timing of New Zealand's next Census of Population and Dwellings and appointing the timing of New Zealand's Census of Population and Dwellings | Stats NZ
content:
## Cabinet papers – Confirmation of timing of New Zealand's next Census of Population and Dwellings and appointing the timing of New Zealand's Census of Population and Dwellings
10 October 2022, 1:00pm
The following cabinet papers, minutes of decision, and supporting papers concern the timing of the next census, including consideration of the results of the 2022 census test and design assurance work to understand confidence in the Assist collection approach.
The following papers have been approved for proactive release by the Minister of Statistics, Hon Dr David Clark.
- Cabinet paper: Appointing the timing of New Zealand’s Census of Population and Dwellings (Office of the Minister of Statistics)
- Cabinet Minute of Decision: Appointing the timing of New Zealand’s Census of Population and Dwellings [CAB-22-MIN-0391] (September 2022)
- Cabinet paper: Confirmation of timing of New Zealand’s next Census of Population and Dwellings (Office of the Minister of Statistics)
- Cabinet Minute of Decision: Confirmation of timing of New Zealand’s next Census of Population and Dwellings [CAB-22-MIN-0338.02] (August 2022)
- Aide memoire to the Minister of Statistics: Cabinet Paper: Confirmation of timing of New Zealand’s next Census of Population and Dwellings – Talking points (MM2336)
- Report to the Minister of Statistics: Feedback from departmental consultation on Cabinet paper: Confirmation of date of next Census of Population and Dwellings (MM2315)
- Report to the Minister of Statistics: Decision on the timing of the next Census and supporting Cabinet paper (MM2302)
- Memorandum to the Government Statistician: Recommendation from the 2023 Census Programme Board regarding the timing of the next census
- Report to the Minister of Statistics: 2023 Census – Update on the 2022 census test, assurance workstream, and process to confirm the timing of the next census (MM2272).
Please note that some content has been withheld under sections 9(2)(f)(iv) and 9(2)(g)(i) of the Official Information Act 1982. Content out of scope has also been redacted.
